headline: 'I hate customer-service chatbots': The consumer-AI refund relationship is off to a rocky start
summary: Generative AI is designed to please humans, but maybe not in the case of customer service chatbots dealing with angry consumers looking for refunds.

raw.headline: 'I hate customer-service chatbots': The consumer-AI refund relationship is off to a rocky start

headline: Beyond Meat Posts Downbeat Q4 Results, Joins RH, ORIC Pharmaceuticals And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Wednesday's Pre-Market Session
summary: US stock futures higher with Dow up 200 pts, Beyond Meat shares drop after downbeat results; ORIC, RH, Aptiv, Sweetgreen, Nike, and others also decline.
